emails.subject: PEBBLE BEACH UPDATE
emails.body: PEBBLE BEACH UPDATE Please note that there is a 10 day out (from the event) full refund cancellation policy at the Pebble Beach resort for both hotel and golf. In order to save the original dates of March 8-11, 2001 for four people, I have sent a deposit to confirm the reservation. If you choose not to go with these dates, I will have no problem receiving a full refund. Please let me know how you would like to proceed with this project and if you would like to look at alternate dates. THANKS!!

emails.subject: PEBBLE BEACH UPDATE
emails.body: PEBBLE BEACH UPDATE Below is the availability of alternate rooms at the Inn at Spanish Bay for March 8-11, 2001: Forest View Room @$425/night some double queen size currently available. Scenic View Room $475/night no double accommodations available and single rooms are sold out. Ocean View Room @$525/night some double queen size currently available. If you would like to pay by credit card, I will need the type of card, number, name expiration date on the card. Along with the credit card information, I will need to know the names of the other 3 people attending. I have reserved golf for Friday, March 9th at 7:20 a.m. at Links at Spanish Bay and Saturday, March 10th at 12:00 p.m. at Pebble Beach Golf Links. Room availability is tight so we should move on this as soon as possible. Please let me know how you would like to proceed with this event. THANKS!

emails.subject: Re: PEBBLE BEACH UPDATE
emails.body: Re: PEBBLE BEACH UPDATE John Lavorato Amex 371385129301004 Exp 06/03 Dave Delainey Rob Milnthorp Barry Tycholiz Book us 3 rooms and make sure that we can have 2 beds in one of the rooms. Thanks John
